title: iris cengialti subsp. illyrica
intro: Iris cengialti subsp. illyrica, also known as the Illyrian iris, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant contains bioactive compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Iris cengialti subsp. illyrica can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as rheumatism and skin irritations.
